# Overview

This sample knowledge base exists only to exercise the server.

Use the layers like this:

- `raw/` — raw source material and linked assets
- `pages/` — maintained synthesized pages
- `index.md` — the navigation map
- `log.md` — the maintenance history

## How to read it

1. Start with [[index]].
2. Read the relevant synthesized page under `pages/`.
3. Inspect `raw/` when you need the original source material.
